channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Israeli settler blindfolds and detains Palestinian in occupied West Bank
item.description: An armed Israeli settler blindfolded and detained a Palestinian man in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Britain is losing the ability to tell anti-Semitism from dissent
item.description: The collapse of that distinction protects no one — least of all the Jewish communities it claims to defend.

item.title: From the Nakba to Gaza’s ruins: One man’s lifetime of displacement
item.description: Nakba survivor in Gaza recounts displacement after 1948 and 2023 and his unwavering attachment to his homeland.

item.title: Russia’s Putin to visit China following Trump’s trip
item.description: Putin and Chinese President Xi Jinping plan to 'further strengthen the comprehensive partnership', the Kremlin says.

item.title: Iran war day 78: Trump, Tehran signal talks as Lebanon truce extended
item.description: Iran says Trump signalled openness to talks as deadlock remains over Tehran’s nuclear programme.

item.title: Gunmen kidnap dozens of students in Nigeria’s Borno State
item.description: No group ​claimed responsibility for the raid, which bore the hallmark of the ​Boko Haram group.

item.title: Spain PM defends Eurovision boycott over Israel
item.description: Spanish PM Pedro Sanchez has defended Spain’s boycott of the Eurovision Song Contest over Israel’s participation.

item.title: Man killed in great white shark attack in western Australia
item.description: The 38-year-old was bitten at a popular diving and fishing spot near the city of Perth, police say.

item.title: Aston Villa trounce Liverpool 4-2 to seal Champions League place
item.description: Liverpool's woes deepen as Ollie Watkins scores a brace to help his side to a dominant win at Villa Park.

item.title: Where did Eurovision go wrong?
item.description: Eurovision has long claimed to be apolitical. This year, that claim may be its most contested performance yet.

item.title: US charges alleged Iran-backed ⁠Kataib Hezbollah suspect – What we know
item.description: The US Justice Department has arrested and charged an Iraqi national and senior commander of an Iran-backed armed group

item.title: Trump says ISIL second-in-command Abu-Bilal al-Minuki killed
item.description: US and Nigerian forces carry out a joint operation against the commander, who was deemed a 'global terrorist' in 2023.

item.title: Wembanyama’s Spurs reach Western finals, Pistons stay alive in NBA playoffs
item.description: San Antonio beat Timberwolves to book Western Conference Finals spot, while Detroit down Cleveland to level series.

item.title: Outbreak of rare strain of Ebola claims at least 65 lives in DR Congo
item.description: Sixty-five people have died in a new Ebola outbreak in DR Congo's Ituri province with 246 suspected cases.

item.title: Israel launches deadly air strikes on Gaza City apartment building
item.description: At least seven Palestinians were killed when Israeli air strikes hit a residential building and a vehicle in Gaza City.

item.title: UK artist defends ‘Drawings Against Genocide’ after show cancelled
item.description: UK artist Matthew Collings says his exhibition “Drawings Against Genocide” has been falsely depicted as anti-Semitic.

item.title: Gaza aid convoy in Libya prepares to head to Gaza
item.description: The "Soumoud 2" land convoy is preparing to leave Libya to bring aid to Gaza.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran warns more economic woes for US over ‘war of choice’
item.description: Iranian FM's warning comes as Israel continues to attack Lebanon, hours after agreeing to a 45-day ceasefire extension.

item.title: Activists hang Palestinian flag on the Eiffel Tower for Nakba Day
item.description: Members of Extinction Rebellion scaled the Eiffel Tower to hang a Palestinian flag for Nakba day.

item.title: Mahmoud Khalil calls for deportation to be halted in light of new evidence
item.description: Lawyers say new evidence suggests Trump admin 'engineered' outcome of case against pro-Palestine Columbia student.

item.title: What are World Cup 2026 national team base camps and their locations?
item.description: Training and accommodation locations for Argentina, Portugal, Spain, Brazil, England, Iran and other World Cup teams.

item.title: Seven killed in Gaza on Nakba Day as Israel says it targets Hamas member
item.description: Three women and a child among civilians killed in Israel's latest attacks on Gaza City.

item.title: What did Trump and Xi discuss during the China summit?
item.description: US President Donald Trump concluded a two-day summit in Beijing with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

item.title: Cuba hit by protests, blackouts amid oil shortage
item.description: Cubans lit fires in Havana’s streets to protest electricity blackouts.

item.title: Ex-Sinaloa security chief in Mexico arrested in US over alleged cartel ties
item.description: Gerardo Merida Sanchez was arrested in Arizona on May 11 before being transferred to New York.
